creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks, committed.  A couple of comments: 

(1) I removed DIST_SUBDIR, granted "mini-icons.tar.gz" doesn't sound 
very mlvwm-specific but I don't think that will warrant yet 
another subdirectory under distfiles/. 

(2) Please don't touch the $Id$ line for updated ports.
